title: RedlineBench Task
description: Logical contents of one RedlineBench task (mirrored in tests/rubrics.json).

input_group.description: s{scenario}-t{turn}-g{group}; tasks sharing this have identical model input.

variant.description: Attorney rubric-set variant within the group (a, b, ...).

author.description: Tracked-change author string the agent must use; grading keys on it.

justification.description: Attorney rationale; context only, not graded.

category.description: Rubric dimension, e.g. Legal correctness, Deal-closing Orientation.

weight.description: Importance 1-10; negative = penalty rubric (an undesirable edit).
